SEARCH
Package org.atmosphere.pool

Class UnboundedApachePoolableProvider

java.lang.Object
org.atmosphere.pool.UnboundedApachePoolableProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
AtmosphereConfigAware, PoolableProvider<Broadcaster,org.apache.commons.pool2.impl.GenericObjectPool<Broadcaster>>
Direct Known Subclasses:
BoundedApachePoolableProvider
public class UnboundedApachePoolableProvider extends Object implements PoolableProvider<Broadcaster,org.apache.commons.pool2.impl.GenericObjectPool<Broadcaster>>
An Unbounded Broadcaster Pool Provider of Broadcaster

      public long activeBroadcaster()

      Current number of active Broadcaster borrowed from the pool

    • implementation

      public org.apache.commons.pool2.impl.GenericObjectPool<Broadcaster> implementation()
      Description copied from interface: PoolableProvider
      Return the current native pool implementation. For example, the GenericObjectPool from Apache Common will be returned if the UnboundedApachePoolableProvider is used.
      Specified by:
      implementation in interface PoolableProvider<Broadcaster,org.apache.commons.pool2.impl.GenericObjectPool<Broadcaster>>
      Returns:
      the current native pool implementation
